title: Clearwater Hot Tub, Pool and Spa Test Strips x 25-3 in 1 - Measures Chlorine, PH and Total Alkalinity
features: 25 test strips: Includes 25 x clearwater dip test strips that make caring for your pool simple and easy
Measures chlorine, PH and alkalinity: Measures various quality levels of swimming pool or spa water to indicate what chemicals are needed to prevent harmful bacteria entering your water
Quick and easy to use - simply dip the test strips into the water and check the results on the handy printed colour chart
Directions: Dip strip and remove immediately, hold strip level for 15 seconds, use the simple-to-use guide on bottle to read the results
Clearwater is a BISHTA approved member and recommended by brands such as Bestway and Lay-Z-Spa for reliable, safe and high-quality water treatment
description: From the brand Previous page Discover the full range of Clearwater chemicals, which has all you need to effectively clean and maintain your pool or hot tub. Designed with ease of use in mind, the Clearwater range is simple and time effective. Each product comes with an easy to follow guide, so you will have clean and healthy water in no time.
